title: hordeum murinum var. secalinum
intro: Hordeum murinum var. secalinum, also known as false barley, is a subspecies of the wild barley plant that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been used to treat various health issues such as digestive problems and skin conditions. The health benefits of Hordeum murinum var. secalinum include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be consumed as a food supplement, either in its raw form or as an extract.
